items.title: Astronics Q4 Earnings Loom: Should You Buy the Stock Ahead of Results?
items.description: ATRO is set to post Q4 results after market close, with earnings expected to rise on strong aerospace demand and margin gains.

items.title: BAE Systems demonstrates modular airborne electromagnetic attack capabilities at U.S. Air Force test events
items.description: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has successfully demonstrated scaled electromagnetic attack (EA) capabilities during multiple test events using a modular version of its high-performance hardware, which is designed to neutralize adversary air defenses and disrupt their use of the electromagnetic spectrum for battlespace coordination. The small-scale systems enable mass electromagnetic effects from multiple platforms with differing mission capabilities.

items.title: Should Investors Buy RYAAY Post a Bullish Fiscal 2026 Traffic Outlook?
items.description: With Ryanair shares moving north, we assess the current positioning of the stock to determine if it's a good investment at this juncture.

items.title: UAL Orders 300 GEnx Engines From GE Aerospace to Power Boeing 787s
items.description: United Airlines selects 300 GE GEnx engines for new 787s, becomes the largest GEnx operator and boosts GE's long-term service revenues.

items.title: AVIATION EQUIPMENT PROCESSING Acquires VANTAGE ASSOCIATES in Strategic Transaction; Impact Capital Group Inc. Serves as Exclusive Advisor
items.description: LOS ANGELES, February 23, 2026--Aviation Equipment Processing ("AEP") is a premier processing, bonding, and composites company serving both the commercial and military aerospace industries. AEP is one of the few companies approved to do Phosphoric Acid Anodizing (PAA) for Boeing, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, Robinson Helicopter and many other primes. AEP supplies companies across the globe with superior service, top quality workmanship, and the best turnaround times possible from its 45,00
